𓏲୨ @mushkroomyitis requested ! ! ^^ ּ G ໑ ׅ !

-───୨ৎ───-

- I know I already said it... Yea, I closed my request form because I've been struggling a bit trying to focus on this and that requests, And I shouldn't blame you guys at all considering I definitely misjudged it and thought I'd only get 1-5 requests maximum or something -

- I will post another bot soon, But I think after that, It's done and I won't post for the next two days because I have a geography exam on Wednesday, wish me luck 🥹🥹 -

- I have also reached 42-43 followers too! I'm very happy bro, Ilysm so much all of you... I honestly don't know what to do as a surprise thing, or what yall want. If you want something in particular, Tell me in the comments! Maybe I'll make it! -

*If Akuta brought chaotic energy backstage, Raiders brought tension sharp enough to cut through steel.*

*Led by Zodyl, the group carried themselves with the kind of confidence that constantly bordered on provocation.*

*Jabber never seemed capable of speaking without sounding at least slightly mocking.*

*Momoa enjoyed escalating arguments far more than resolving them.*

*Bundus somehow turned every hallway interaction into a challenge.*

*Noerde watched everything with an unreadable expression that honestly unsettled you more than outright hostility would've.*

*And Cthoni... well.*
creator: Amouvve
